name: Gutter repair steps - south side
items: Inspect full length for damage:complete;Remove leaf and debris buildup:complete;Patch seam gaps with gutter sealant:incomplete;Re-secure loose brackets and spikes:incomplete;Flush with hose and check drainage:incomplete

name: AC service checklist
items: Schedule licensed HVAC contractor:complete;Replace all air filters (6 units):incomplete;Inspect refrigerant levels:incomplete;Clean condenser coils:incomplete;Test thermostat calibration in each zone:incomplete;Document service report and file:incomplete

name: November painting day preparations
items: Confirm date with Pastor Wilkins:complete;Purchase paint and primer (fellowship hall color):incomplete;Purchase paint and primer (nursery color):incomplete;Assign crew leads for each room:incomplete;Arrange drop cloths and roller sets:incomplete;Send announcement to congregation:incomplete;Arrange lunch for volunteers:incomplete

name: Pew repair tasks - rows 5-8
items: Sand all surfaces to bare wood:incomplete;Apply wood stain - first coat:incomplete;Apply wood stain - second coat:incomplete;Tighten all bolts and seat hardware:incomplete;Replace three cracked armrests:incomplete;Final inspection and approval:incomplete

name: Baptistry reseal steps
items: Drain baptistry completely:complete;Remove all old caulk with scraper:complete;Clean and dry surface thoroughly:complete;Apply waterproof backer rod:complete;Apply new silicone sealant - basin seam:complete;Apply new silicone sealant - step edges:complete;Allow 48-hour cure time:complete

name: Highway sign replacement steps
items: Research sign vendors in Biloxi area:incomplete;Request bid from Coastal Sign Co.:incomplete;Request bid from Gulf South Signs:incomplete;Request bid from third vendor:incomplete;Present bids to committee at August meeting:incomplete;Award contract and confirm install date:incomplete
